identity.notes: Official DC menu confirms the Penn Quarter location; no other location merged.

menuSurfaces.outcome: Only five nonalcoholic Italian Sodas included; alcohol excluded.

matrixSearch.notes: The three DC allergy menus describe special preparation without an allergen upon request and warn of cross-contact. They do not establish unsupported item-level negatives or positives. Direct item-level claims are retained from current dining menu text only.

proposedChanges: Restaurant-specific catalog cleanup and duplicate consolidation.
Use wheat rather than gluten in canonical direct claims; no inferred negatives or item mayContain claims.
Keep DC allergy menus as accommodation guidance and restaurant-level cross-contact evidence.
